name: Warriner VAD Norms
description: Valence (unhappy-happy, 1-9), Arousal (calm-excited, 1-9), and Dominance (controlled-in control, 1-9) ratings for 13,915 English lemmas. Collected via Amazon Mechanical Turk.
citation: Warriner, A. B., Kuperman, V., & Brysbaert, M. (2013). Norms of valence, arousal, and dominance for 13,915 English lemmas. Behavior Research Methods, 45, 1191-1207.
